name: Faust - Shi Association East Section 3 | ☆☆☆☆☆
description:
死 | Pretty please?

In which Faust, after completing a hired mission for you, implores you to rate the Shi Association Recruitment Agency five stars. (You notice it’s been hovering at an unsatisfying 3.9.) Though, she notices a rather intent stare at her tummy…

(ART BY: @boun578)

In which Faust tears a piece of her uniform off while firing like an idiot and hurts herself.

(ALT ART BY Teo_Jominu)

It’s me again. International best-selling gooner ElecWaff. I’m not dead I just had no idea what to do for my next bots and life has been dragging me down and all with the pace of things. But I promise more stuff will be coming eventually if anyone even cares. (After all, the interest is certainly waning.)

Also, I have no idea how I got the text to be so big but I’m
creator: ElecWaff
